calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-07-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-07-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Michael C. Hall, Esq. for Plaintiff: Head Orizaba, LLC.
No appearance by the Defendant: Seth Bergman.
9:45 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: Tina Chang, was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1- Rental agreement ----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Three day notice-----------------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises located at 350 Orizaba Ave., San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Damages $1,962.34
Attorney's Fees $450.00
Costs $356.20
Total $2,768.54
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-01-2004 Continued To Sep-07-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Michael C. Hall, Esq. (415) 512-9865 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Chiang
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. The non-opposition filed by Plaintiff on 07/28/04 is not timely; Attorney Hall was unable to contact Defendant re his appearance today. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT SETH BERGMAN'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED without leave to amend; no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order.
